description:
The docker package provides necessary software to create containers, which are self-sufficient and self-contained applications using the resource isolation features of the kernel. The docker package can be installed with the following command: 
$ sudo dnf install docker
rationale: To be able to run the docker service, the docker package has to be installed.
ocil_clause: the docker package is not installed
ocil:
Run the following command to determine if the docker package is installed: 
$ rpm -q docker
title: Install the docker Package
